message:
chore(beads): update beads directory gitignore configuration

Updates the .beads/.gitignore file to reflect current beads workflow
requirements for the local issue tracking system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,3 +37,9 @@ beads.right.meta.json
 # contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.
 # The JSONL files (issues.jsonl, interactions.jsonl) and config files
 # are tracked by git by default since no pattern above ignores them.
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
